---
title: "The Life of the Right Reverend Father in God, Thomas Wilson, Lord Bishop of Sodor and Man"
---

## The Life of the Right Reverend Father in God, Thomas Wilson, Lord Bishop of Sodor and Man

**Author:** The Rev. John Keble
**Date:** 1893
**Imprint:** Oxford: Parker

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
